stemHtml: In accordance with OPS regulations, 100% of the passengers in a non-pressurised aircraft shall be supplied with supplemental oxygen for the entire flight time…

options.b: at pressure altitudes above 13 000 ft and for any period exceeding 30 minutes at pressure altitudes above 10 000 ft but not exceeding 13 000 ft.
options.d: after 30 minutes at pressure altitudes greater than 10 000 ft but not exceeding 13 000 ft.
